case_title: GREGG BUSTOS VS. CONTI MATERIALS SERVICES LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,182.67 FILED BY BUSTOS, GREGG AS TO DEFENDANT CONTI MATERIALS SERVICES LLC MALCOLM DRILLING COMPANY, INC. CORTEZ, LUCIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUSTOS, GREGG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-14-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CONTI MATERIALS SERVICES LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CONTI MATERIALS SERVICES LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SIGNED) SERVED AUG-14-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MALCOLM DRILLING COMPANY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-28-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF GREGG BUSTOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CONTI MATERIALS SERVICES LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH LOPEZ, SUPERVISOR. DEFENDANT MALCOLM DRILLING COMPANY, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR LUCIO CORTEZ. PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS LUCIO CORTEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUSTOS, GREGG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONTI MATERIALS SERVICES LLC MALCOLM DRILLING COMPANY, INC. $4,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,200.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST LUCIO CORTEZ IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
